text: Prof. John Mearsheimer: If you’re Japan or South Korea, the lesson is simple from Iran War. You’d better have your own nuclear deterrent.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授：如果你是日本或韩国，从伊朗战争中得到的教训很简单。你最好拥有自己的核威慑力量。

text: Prof. John Mearsheimer on Iran War: The only off-ramp here is surrender for Trump. The question is on what terms.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授谈伊朗战争：特朗普目前唯一的退路就是投降。问题在于以什么条件投降。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 IRIB: Almost all of the Iranian delegation, including experts and specialised committees, is now negotiating with Pakistani and American teams. The presence of U.S. economic and legal experts suggests Washington may be serious, but past American…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 An Iranian state media anchor declared that the United States cannot destroy Iran's nuclear advancements and knowledge via bombing in an address to American officials. "To American statesmen: you cannot destroy Iran's nuclear knowledge through bombing, now that they have mastered the nuclear cycle." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国广播电视台（IRIB）：几乎整个伊朗代表团，包括专家和专门委员会，目前正在与巴基斯坦和美国团队进行谈判。美国经济和法律专家的在场表明华盛顿可能是认真的，但过去美国的……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 一位伊朗官方媒体主播在向美国官员发表讲话时宣称，美国无法通过轰炸摧毁伊朗的核进展和知识。“致美国政治家：你们无法通过轰炸摧毁伊朗的核知识，因为他们已经掌握了核循环。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 IRIB: The Islamabad talks have moved into expert and technical phase. Specialized committee members from Iran's delegation have now joined the negotiations. Expert-level talks means they're getting into the specifics: enrichment, sanctions, Hormuz, assets. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 IRIB：伊斯兰堡会谈已进入专家和技术阶段。伊朗代表团的专门委员会成员现已加入谈判。专家级会谈意味着他们正在深入细节：浓缩、制裁、霍尔木兹海峡、资产。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTtechnical US warships reportedly crossed the Strait of Hormuz earlier today, entering the Persian Gulf, then turning around. At least one destroyer, the USS Michael Murphy, briefly popped up on AIS inside the Gulf. Iranian state TV said the ship retreated after warnings. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042963486381126020/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 据报道，美国军舰今天早些时候穿过霍尔木兹海峡，进入波斯湾，随后掉头。至少有一艘驱逐舰，即迈克尔·墨菲号（USS Michael Murphy），在AIS上短暂出现在海湾内。伊朗国家电视台称，该舰在收到警告后撤退。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042963486381126020/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix https://x.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042757780084265415/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix https://x.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042757780084265415/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : Recovery crews are circling the capsule, inspecting heat shield and structure before giving the all clear. The crew will still stay inside for some time before exiting. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042767669263315112/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：回收人员正在环绕太空舱，在给出一切正常信号前检查隔热罩和结构。机组人员在离开前仍需在舱内停留一段时间。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042767669263315112/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷Axios: U.S. warships transited the Strait of Hormuz in both directions, crossing into the Gulf and then returning to the Arabian Sea. "This was an operation focused on freedom of navigation through international waters.” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: Two U.S. Navy guided-missile destroyers transited the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday, marking the first passage of American warships through the waterway since the war began six weeks ago. No incidents were reported, neither were the two ships escorting any commercial vessels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Axios：美国军舰双向穿过霍尔木兹海峡，进入海湾，然后返回阿拉伯海。“这是一次专注于国际水域航行自由的行动。” @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：两艘美国海军导弹驱逐舰周六穿过霍尔木兹海峡，这是自六周前战争开始以来美国军舰首次通过该水道。没有发生任何事件，两艘船也没有护送任何商船。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding near Karmiel, Sakhnin, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Lower Galilee • Upper Galilee @wfwitness" About 10 rockets were launched
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部卡尔米尔、萨赫宁及周边地区响起红色警报：• 下加利利 • 上加利利 @wfwitness” 大约发射了10枚火箭弹

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah launched in the Karmiel direction. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党向卡尔米尔方向发射了火箭弹。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 Al Jadeed: Lebanese President Nawaf Salam will meet UN Secretary‑General António Guterres on Tuesday in New York, and U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday in Washington. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has decided to delay his trip to the United Nations and the United States in order to continue managing the government’s work from Beirut amid the current internal situation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 Al Jadeed：黎巴嫩总统纳瓦夫·萨拉姆将于周二在纽约会见联合国秘书长古特雷斯，并于周四在华盛顿会见美国国务卿马尔科·卢比奥。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆决定推迟前往联合国和美国的行程，以便在当前内部局势下继续在贝鲁特管理政府工作。 @wfwitness

text: U.S. authorities have revoked the lawful permanent resident status of family members of Masoumeh Ebtekar, who was a spokeswoman during the Iran hostage crisis.
text_zh: 美国当局已撤销了伊朗人质危机期间担任发言人的马苏梅·埃布特卡（Masoumeh Ebtekar）家属的合法永久居民身份。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 ☀️ As part of a prisoner exchange under the 29 January 2026 agreement, the Syrian Democratic Forces (SDF) released 90 detainees, while the Syrian government released approximately 400 SDF members. The exchange took place on Saturday in the Hasakah countryside. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 ☀️ 作为2026年1月29日协议下囚犯交换的一部分，叙利亚民主力量（SDF）释放了90名被拘留者，而叙利亚政府释放了约400名SDF成员。交换于周六在哈塞克农村地区进行。 @wfwitness

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Channel 14 in Hebrew: An explosion of a drone in a building inside the Shlomi settlement in Western Galilee.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列第14频道（希伯来语）：西加利利什洛米定居点内的一栋建筑发生无人机爆炸。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding near Karmiel, Sakhnin, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Lower Galilee • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部卡尔米尔、萨赫宁及周边地区响起红色警报：• 下加利利 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇮🇷 US Navy destroyer USS Michael Murphy (DDG-112) is crossing the strait of Hormuz today according to AIS data. MenchOsint. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 ❌ 🇺🇸 Mehr News: A senior Iranian military official denied Axios claims that a US vessel crossed the Strait of Hormuz. The American military vessel was warned it would be targeted within 15 minutes if it continued moving toward the Strait. Iran's Armed Forces issued a firm and swift warning, preventing the vessel from approaching the Strait of Hormuz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇮🇷 根据AIS数据，美国海军驱逐舰迈克尔·墨菲号（DDG-112）今天正在穿过霍尔木兹海峡。MenchOsint。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 ❌ 🇺🇸 梅尔通讯社：一位伊朗高级军事官员否认了Axios关于美国船只穿过霍尔木兹海峡的说法。美国军舰收到警告，如果继续向海峡移动，将在15分钟内成为目标。伊朗武装部队发出了坚定而迅速的警告，阻止了该船靠近霍尔木兹海峡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🌟 Hezbollah: I am certain and with my weapon, I will liberate... my country and the light of truth shines in my hand.
text_zh: 🌟 真主党：我确信，带着我的武器，我将解放……我的国家，真理之光在我手中闪耀。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇮🇷 US Navy destroyer USS Michael Murphy (DDG-112) is crossing the strait of Hormuz today according to AIS data. MenchOsint. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 Senior Iranian military official denies report of any US vessel crossing the Strait of Hormuz — IRIB 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Axios: Several U.S. Navy ships crossed the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday, a U.S. official said. The move was not coordinated with Iran. It's the first time this has happened since the beginning of the Iran war. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: U.S. warships transited the Strait of Hormuz in both directions, crossing into the Gulf and then returning to the Arabian Sea. "This was an operation focused on freedom of navigation through international waters.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Axios：一位美国官员称，几艘美国海军舰艇周六穿过霍尔木兹海峡。此举未与伊朗协调。这是自伊朗战争开始以来首次发生这种情况。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：美国军舰双向穿过霍尔木兹海峡，进入海湾，然后返回阿拉伯海。“这是一次专注于国际水域航行自由的行动。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Tasnim: Iran‑US talks have begun in Islamabad and moved into the expert phase, with committees on economic, military, legal and nuclear affairs meeting. Iran had set two preconditions: a tangible, lasting ceasefire in Lebanon (not limited to Beirut)…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 IRIB: Almost all of the Iranian delegation, including experts and specialised committees, is now negotiating with Pakistani and American teams. The presence of U.S. economic and legal experts suggests Washington may be serious, but past American behaviour makes it difficult to predict the outcome. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊美会谈已在伊斯兰堡开始并进入专家阶段，经济、军事、法律和核事务委员会正在开会。伊朗设定了两个先决条件：在黎巴嫩实现切实、持久的停火（不限于贝鲁特）……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 IRIB：几乎整个伊朗代表团，包括专家和专门委员会，目前正在与巴基斯坦和美国团队进行谈判。美国经济和法律专家的在场表明华盛顿可能是认真的，但过去美国的行为使得结果难以预测。 @wfwitness

text: Pakistan has arranged local entertainment options for the journalists and officials attending the Islamabad talks.
text_zh: 巴基斯坦为参加伊斯兰堡会谈的记者和官员安排了当地娱乐活动。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Tasnim News Agency: An Iranian security official has denied an Axios report that US navy ships crossed the Strait of Hormuz today. The official said that since the ceasefire began, no ships have transited the strait. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Maritime tracking data logged a U.S. Naval vessel transiting the Strait of Hormuz, providing evidence against semi-official Iranian media claims. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社：一位伊朗安全官员否认了Axios关于美国海军舰艇今天穿过霍尔木兹海峡的报道。该官员表示，自停火开始以来，没有任何船只穿过海峡。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 海事跟踪数据显示一艘美国海军舰艇穿过了霍尔木兹海峡，为反驳伊朗半官方媒体的说法提供了证据。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 Members of Iranian expert committees in economic, military, legal and nuclear affairs are moving to another part of the Serena Hotel in Islamabad for consultations with the main negotiating team. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Tasnim: Iran‑US talks have begun in Islamabad and moved into the expert phase, with committees on economic, military, legal and nuclear affairs meeting. Iran had set two preconditions: a tangible, lasting ceasefire in Lebanon (not limited to Beirut) and the release of frozen Iranian assets. The US has reportedly agreed, but Iran remains distrustful and insists on concrete signs. The Iranian delegation met Pakistan’s army chief twice and the prime minister before talks began. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 伊朗经济、军事、法律和核事务专家委员会成员正在前往伊斯兰堡塞雷纳酒店的另一部分，与主要谈判团队进行磋商。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊美会谈已在伊斯兰堡开始并进入专家阶段，经济、军事、法律和核事务委员会正在开会。伊朗设定了两个先决条件：在黎巴嫩实现切实、持久的停火（不限于贝鲁特）并解冻伊朗资产。据报道，美国已同意，但伊朗仍持怀疑态度，并坚持要求看到具体迹象。伊朗代表团在会谈开始前两次会见了巴基斯坦陆军参谋长和总理。 @wfwitness

text: U.S. official now says the American warships transited the Strait of Hormuz into the Arabian Sea before returning to the Gulf. The official described it as a "freedom of navigation operation in international waters." Source: Axios
text_zh: 美国官员现在表示，美国军舰穿过霍尔木兹海峡进入阿拉伯海，然后返回海湾。该官员将其描述为“国际水域的航行自由行动”。来源：Axios

text: UK Bows to U.S. Pressure as it Halts Chagos Transfer to Mauritius Facing blunt opposition from Trump, the UK has backed off plans to return the Chagos Islands to Mauritius, freezing a deal involving a 99 year lease of Diego Garcia, a joint UK-U.S. strategic military base since the 1970s. READ MORE
text_zh: 英国屈服于美国压力，停止向毛里求斯移交查戈斯群岛。面对特朗普的直言反对，英国放弃了将查戈斯群岛归还毛里求斯的计划，冻结了一项涉及迪戈加西亚岛99年租约的协议，该岛自1970年代以来一直是英美联合战略军事基地。阅读更多

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Fars News Agency: An American destroyer turned back from the Strait of Hormuz after a firm warning from Iran. The foreign ministry spokesman said a potential ceasefire violation was prevented by immediate diplomatic and military action. The U.S.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Tasnim News Agency: An Iranian security official has denied an Axios report that US navy ships crossed the Strait of Hormuz today. The official said that since the ceasefire began, no ships have transited the strait. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 法尔斯通讯社：一艘美国驱逐舰在伊朗发出坚定警告后从霍尔木兹海峡折返。外交部发言人表示，通过及时的外交和军事行动，防止了潜在的停火违规。美国……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社：一位伊朗安全官员否认了Axios关于美国海军舰艇今天穿过霍尔木兹海峡的报道。该官员表示，自停火开始以来，没有任何船只穿过海峡。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 US Navy destroyer USS Michael Murphy (DDG-112) is crossing the strait of Hormuz today according to AIS data. MenchOsint . 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 根据AIS数据，美国海军驱逐舰迈克尔·墨菲号（DDG-112）今天正在穿过霍尔木兹海峡。MenchOsint。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 US destroyer turned back from the Strait of Hormuz after Iran’s firm warning — Iran’s FM said a potential ceasefire violation was prevented by an immediate diplomatic response and a firm military warning. — According to Fars News Agency, the case…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A security official denied Axios's claim that US Navy ships passed through the Strait of Hormuz today — Mehr News. This claim comes while no ship has passed through the Strait of Hormuz since the ceasefire.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 美国驱逐舰在伊朗坚定警告后从霍尔木兹海峡折返 — 伊朗外交部表示，通过及时的外交回应和坚定的军事警告，防止了潜在的停火违规。 — 据法尔斯通讯社报道，该事件……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 一位安全官员否认了Axios关于美国海军舰艇今天通过霍尔木兹海峡的说法 — 梅尔通讯社。这一说法出现时，自停火以来没有任何船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 The Islamabad talks between Iran and the United States have entered the expert stage. This means that after initial high‑level political discussions, technical experts are now working on the details of a potential agreement. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Members of Iranian expert committees in economic, military, legal and nuclear affairs are moving to another part of the Serena Hotel in Islamabad for consultations with the main negotiating team. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 伊朗与美国在伊斯兰堡的会谈已进入专家阶段。这意味着在初步的高层政治讨论之后，技术专家现在正在制定潜在协议的细节。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗经济、军事、法律和核事务专家委员会成员正在前往伊斯兰堡塞雷纳酒店的另一部分，与主要谈判团队进行磋商。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active near Nahariya, Acre, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Lower Galilee • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部纳哈里亚、阿卡及周边地区无人机警报活跃：• 对抗线 • 下加利利 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: Former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene: Republicans are going to get slaughtered in the midterms.
text_zh: 前众议员玛乔丽·泰勒·格林：共和党人在中期选举中将会惨败。

text: NEW: The United States has agreed to release Iran’s frozen assets and to a ceasefire in Lebanon. Source: IRIB
text_zh: 最新消息：美国已同意解冻伊朗资产并同意在黎巴嫩停火。来源：IRIB

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 The ceasefire between Russian and Ukrainian forces has officialy started. If everything goes as expected, fighting will continue until the end of the ceasefire on April 13. The fighting will then continue. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukraine and Russia exchanged prisoners this Easter with 175 military personnel being exchanged on both sides, with an additional seven Ukrainian civilians also being exchanged. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰军队之间的停火已正式开始。如果一切按预期进行，战斗将持续到4月13日停火结束。之后战斗将继续。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰和俄罗斯在这个复活节交换了囚犯，双方共交换了175名军事人员，另有7名乌克兰平民也被交换。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated The Easter truce between Ukraine and Russia just started. It runs from 16:00 on April 11 to the end of April 12. Zelensky says Ukraine is ready for a mirrored ceasefire during the Easter holidays to give people safety. Meanwhile, the Kremlin announced an Easter truce from 4:00 PM on April 11 through April 12. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰和俄罗斯之间的复活节休战刚刚开始。时间从4月11日16:00持续到4月12日结束。泽连斯基表示，乌克兰准备在复活节假期期间进行对等停火，以保障人民的安全。与此同时，克里姆林宫宣布从4月11日下午4点到4月12日进行复活节休战。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @idreesali114 : A Pakistani source tells Reuters the three-way talks were face-to-face between Witkoff, Wance, Kushner, Iran's Qalibaf, Araqchi, and Pakistan's army chief. Talks between the United States and Iran, with Pakistani mediation, have started in Islamabad. - Idrees Ali tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @idreesali114：一位巴基斯坦消息人士告诉路透社，三方会谈是维特科夫（Witkoff）、万斯（Wance）、库什纳（Kushner）、伊朗的卡利巴夫（Qalibaf）、阿拉格希（Araqchi）和巴基斯坦陆军参谋长之间的面对面会谈。在巴基斯坦调解下，美国和伊朗之间的会谈已在伊斯兰堡开始。 - Idrees Ali 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 👀 ❓ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 How will the U.S.–Iran talks end? - Successful agreement - Temporary ceasefire - Conflict escalates again - Talks collapse tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：👀 ❓ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美伊会谈将如何结束？ - 达成成功协议 - 临时停火 - 冲突再次升级 - 会谈破裂 推文

text: WarTranslated On Russia 1 TV, russians propagandists compared the Holy Fire ceremony to driving a tank through Berlin. Looks like the May 9 victory cult is already warming up. On Russia 1 they compared the descent of the Holy Fire to going on a tank over Berlin: "You know, once I asked one of my friends at this moment: how it was? And he said: you know, like on a tank over Berlin. Like the victory already happened". Totally retarded, sick in the head creatures - immoral and totally missing the sense of inappropriateness of their sick fantasies during the triumph of the moment, regardless of your attitude towards the religion. Retarded. Sick. Immoral. Inappropriate. - ToBeOr (Быть Или) tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 在俄罗斯1频道，俄罗斯宣传人员将圣火仪式比作驾驶坦克穿过柏林。看起来5月9日的胜利崇拜已经在升温。在俄罗斯1频道，他们将圣火降临比作驾驶坦克穿过柏林：“你知道，有一次我在这一刻问我的一个朋友：感觉如何？他说：你知道，就像驾驶坦克穿过柏林。就像胜利已经发生了一样”。完全是弱智、脑子有病的人——不道德，完全没有意识到在这一胜利时刻发表这种病态幻想的不恰当性，无论你对宗教持什么态度。弱智。有病。不道德。不恰当。 - ToBeOr (Быть Или) 推文

text: Faytuks News Trump says "we're now starting the process of clearing out the strait of hormuz". This comes after Axios reported that US warships have crossed the strait. https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2042952170698367138/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 特朗普说“我们现在开始清理霍尔木兹海峡的过程”。此前Axios报道称美国军舰已经穿过海峡。https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2042952170698367138/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #BREAKING 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 U.S. warships have reportedly crossed the Strait of Hormuz. ➡️ Axios correspondent Barak Ravid said the move was not coordinated with Iran. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042950070060962256/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：#突发 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 据报道，美国军舰已穿过霍尔木兹海峡。➡️ Axios记者巴拉克·拉维德（Barak Ravid）表示，此举未与伊朗协调。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042950070060962256/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News U.S. and Iranian delegations begin talks in Islamabad, Pakistan tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 美国和伊朗代表团在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡开始会谈 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Iran-US talks in Pakistan have begun tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 伊朗与美国在巴基斯坦的会谈已经开始 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : From nearly 250,000 miles away to a pinpoint splashdown, watch Artemis II return home from humanity’s first crewed mission beyond low Earth orbit in over 50 years. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042757780084265415/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：从近25万英里外到精准溅落，观看阿尔忒弥斯2号（Artemis II）返回家园，这是人类50多年来首次载人任务超越近地轨道。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042757780084265415/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "American destroyer has stopped moving due to the firm response of Iranian forces and the warnings delivered by Iran’s delegation in Pakistan. Source: Fars" Iran now says U.S. destroyer has turned back from the Strait of Hormuz following a firm warning from Iran. Source: Tasnim
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“由于伊朗军队的坚定回应以及伊朗代表团在巴基斯坦发出的警告，美国驱逐舰已停止移动。来源：法尔斯” 伊朗现在表示，美国驱逐舰在伊朗发出坚定警告后已从霍尔木兹海峡折返。来源：塔斯尼姆

text: Trump calls the war on Iran a "FIGHT FOR FREEDOM." Remember when they "freed" Iraq and Afghanistan? Not good. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 特朗普称对伊朗的战争是“为自由而战”。还记得他们“解放”伊拉克和阿富汗的时候吗？不好。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 The CENTCOM commander is not present in the negotiations Tasnim's correspondent dispatched to Islamabad, Pakistan, reported that contrary to some speculations raised yesterday, Brad Cooper, the CENTCOM commander, is not present in the American negotiating delegation. J.D. Vance, Trump's deputy, along with Witkoff and Kushner, are present in the negotiations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 中央司令部司令未出席谈判。塔斯尼姆通讯社派往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡的记者报道称，与昨天提出的一些猜测相反，中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀（Brad Cooper）并未出席美国谈判代表团。特朗普的副手J.D.万斯（J.D. Vance）以及维特科夫（Witkoff）和库什纳（Kushner）出席了谈判。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "BREAKING: Iranian forces have informed the Iranian negotiating delegation that a U.S. destroyer is moving from Fujairah Port toward the Strait of Hormuz. Iran has informed the Pakistani mediator that if the American destroyer continues its movement, it will…" American destroyer has stopped moving due to the firm response of Iranian forces and the warnings delivered by Iran’s delegation in Pakistan. Source: Fars
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“突发：伊朗军队已通知伊朗谈判代表团，一艘美国驱逐舰正从富查伊拉港向霍尔木兹海峡移动。伊朗已通知巴基斯坦调解人，如果美国驱逐舰继续移动，它将……” 由于伊朗军队的坚定回应以及伊朗代表团在巴基斯坦发出的警告，美国驱逐舰已停止移动。来源：法尔斯

text: BREAKING: Iranian forces have informed the Iranian negotiating delegation that a U.S. destroyer is moving from Fujairah Port toward the Strait of Hormuz. Iran has informed the Pakistani mediator that if the American destroyer continues its movement, it will be targeted within 30 minutes. Source: Fars
text_zh: 突发：伊朗军队已通知伊朗谈判代表团，一艘美国驱逐舰正从富查伊拉港向霍尔木兹海峡移动。伊朗已通知巴基斯坦调解人，如果美国驱逐舰继续移动，它将在30分钟内成为目标。来源：法尔斯

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi stated that Iran is fully and seriously prepared for every possible scenario. This round of talks is not merely negotiation — it involves demands. In fact, Iran has a long list of its own demands.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 副外长卡泽姆·加里巴巴迪（Kazem Gharibabadi）表示，伊朗已为每一种可能的情况做好了充分且认真的准备。这一轮会谈不仅仅是谈判——它涉及要求。事实上，伊朗有一长串自己的要求。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iran’s deputy foreign minister, Kazem Gharibabadi, said Tehran is ready for all scenarios and is negotiating from a position of strength following the war’s achievements and national unity. He added that the United States has failed to achieve its…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 The Islamabad talks between Iran and the United States have entered the expert stage. This means that after initial high‑level political discussions, technical experts are now working on the details of a potential agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗副外长卡泽姆·加里巴巴迪表示，德黑兰已为所有情况做好准备，并在战争成果和民族团结的基础上从实力地位进行谈判。他补充说，美国未能实现其……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗与美国在伊斯兰堡的会谈已进入专家阶段。这意味着在初步的高层政治讨论之后，技术专家现在正在制定潜在协议的细节。 @wfwitness
